formulas.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales, general and administrative plus Acquisition termination cost equals Total operating expenses
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative + Acquisition termination cost

formulas.formula: Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other, net equals Other income (expense), net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net

formulas.formula: Operating income plus Other income (expense), net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense (benefit) equals Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense (benefit)

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable, net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus Property and equipment, net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets, net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Deferred income taxes - (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Acquisition termination cost - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: CFI components sum to Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities

formulas.formula: CFF components sum to Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Repayment of debt - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash and cash equivalents
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash and cash equivalents

formulas.formula: Beginning cash plus Change equals Ending cash
components: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period Jan 26, 2025)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period Jan 28, 2024)
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to RE minus Tax withholding on RSUs charged to APIC (all equity activity reconciles)
cross_statement_checks.note: RE change = 29817 + 72880 - 834 - 33825 = 68038. Share repurchases of 34015 total split: 1 to common stock par, 189 to APIC, 33825 to retained earnings per equity statement

operating_leases.current_location: Included within Accrued and other current liabilities on balance sheet; confirmed by OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList = AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent and disclosed in Note 9 detail table

depreciation_and_amortization.note: CF statement shows single line of 1864. Note 9 discloses PP&E depreciation of 1.3 billion and Note 6 discloses intangible amortization of 593 million. Segment Note 16 discloses C&N segment DA of 732M and Graphics DA of 372M, total 1104M allocated; remainder in All Other (acquisition intangible amortization)

accounts_receivable.note: Presented as Accounts receivable, net on balance sheet. Note 9 discloses two direct customers represent 17% and 16% of AR balance. No indication of combination with other receivables

capex.note: CF line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets = 3236. Supplemental disclosure: property, equipment and intangible assets acquired by assuming related liabilities = 525M per Note 9

short_term_debt.note: Balance sheet shows Short-term debt of zero as of Jan 26, 2025. Note 11 confirms 0.584% Notes Due 2024 were repaid in fiscal year 2025 and no commercial paper outstanding

interest_expense.source: IS shows Interest expense of 247M (us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating) and Interest income of 1786M (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest) as separate lines. No note breakout of gross vs net interest expense found beyond these IS line items. Cash paid for interest = 246M per CF supplemental

items_corrected: (Gains) losses on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net: sign corrected from +1030 to -1030 (gains reduce cash in indirect method)
Other: sign corrected from +502 to -502 (shown in parentheses in filing, indicating a cash reduction)

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales, general and administrative plus Acquisition termination cost equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other, net equals Other income (expense), net
Operating income plus Other income (expense), net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense (benefit) equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable, net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus Property and equipment, net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets, net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
CFI components sum to Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
CFF components sum to Net cash used in financing activities
CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash and cash equivalents
Beginning cash plus Change equals Ending cash
